methodology.requested_seed_label_semantics: pair label requested by the harness; not an RNG seed and not evidence of shared random draws
methodology.combat_policy: existing Bot BasicSurvival policy with production combat
methodology.treatment_validation: the selected observed launch fingerprint must match after normalizing only the comparison-specific Stockade, Hide Wraps plus its exact displaced starting shirt, or Crude Bandage artifact; hidden ECS state and RNG state are not claimed equivalent; exact declared fixture details are validated
